LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, MITCHEL BERGER, M.D., AND GEOFFREY MANLEY, M.D., PH. D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PLAINTIFFS SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DEFAMATION IS GRANTED. MS. HOLVICK IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT SITES THE VERGOS DECISION AND RELEVANT EVIDENCE AS REQUIRED BY 437 C SUBDIVISION 2. THE ORDER IS TO INCLUDE THE SUSTAINING OF THE OBJECTIONS ON THE HEARSAY GROUNDS AS WELL AS ANY OTHER ASPECTS OF THE COURT'S PREVIOUS TENTATIVE RULING THAT MS. HOLVICK BELIEVES STILL APPLY. MS. HOLVICK IS TO SUBMIT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO MR. SCHWARTZ FOR REVIEW AND THEN PROVIDE IT TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Defamation
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Schwartz of Gwilliam, Ivary, Chiosso, Calli & Brewer telephone number 510-832-5411 for Plaintiff.
Marie Holvick of Gordon & Rees of telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendants.

The matter was discussed. The Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANTS REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, MITCHEL BERGER, M.D., AND GEOFFREY MANLEY, M.D., PH. D.'S Motion For Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Defamation is granted. Ms. Holvick is to prepare a proposed order that sites the Vergos decision and relevant evidence as required by 437 C subdivision 2. The order is to include the sustaining of the objections on the hearsay grounds as well as any other aspects of the Court's previous tentative ruling that Ms. Holvick believes still apply. Ms. Holvick is to submit the proposed order to Mr. Schwartz for review and then provide it to the Court for signature.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Defamation
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Continued To Dec-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Schwartz of Gwilliam, Ivary, Chiosso, Cavalli & Brewer telephone number 510-832-5411 for Plaintiff.
Marie Holvick of Gordon & Rees telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendants.

The matter was argued. The parties agreed to provide further briefing on the issues raised on the record. The briefs are not to exceed 10 pages, are to be e mailed to the Judicial Officer by 6:00 p.m. December 17, 2015 and are to be filed on December 18, 2015. DEFENDANTS
REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, MITCHEL BERGER, M.D. and GEOFFREY MANLEY, M.D., PH. D.'S Motion For Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Defamation is continued to December 18, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
